ddls:
CREATE TABLE "municipalities" (
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each municipality or village */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the municipality or village */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the municipality is located */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the municipality is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the municipality or village */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the municipality or village in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the municipality */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the municipality */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the municipality in meters */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the municipality (e.g., Tropical, Temperate) */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the municipality */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living below the poverty line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., Electricity, Kerosene, Biogas, Solar, Others, Not Stated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "is_renewable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the energy source is renewable */,
  "renewable_type" TEXT /* Type of renewable energy source (e.g., Solar, Wind) if applicable */,
  "non_renewable_type" TEXT /* Type of non-renewable energy source (e.g., Coal, Oil) if applicable */,
  "emission_factor" REAL /* Emission factor of the energy source (e.g., CO2 emissions per unit of energy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy usage record */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality or village */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of households or units using the energy source */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the usage data */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the usage data */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day for the usage data */,
  "average_usage" REAL /* Average usage per household or unit */,
  "peak_usage" REAL /* Peak usage during the month */,
  "off_peak_usage" REAL /* Usage during off-peak hours */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the energy usage */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost per unit of energy usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_usage_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_usage_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy policy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., Active, Inactive, Draft) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the policy */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the policy */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Estimated impact of the policy on energy usage and efficiency */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience or beneficiaries of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_municipalities" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy application */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy policy */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality or village */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy application */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the policy application (e.g., Active, Inactive, Draft) */,
  "expected_impact" TEXT /* Expected impact of the policy on the municipality */,
  "actual_impact" TEXT /* Actual impact of the policy on the municipality */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_municipalities_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_municipalities_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES energy_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy project */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality or village */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Active, Inactive, Completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of energy project (e.g., Solar, Wind, Biogas) */,
  "project_scope" TEXT /* Scope or scale of the project (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "project_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome or results of the project */,
  "project_beneficiaries" INTEGER /* Number of beneficiaries of the project */,
  "project_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the project on energy usage and efficiency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_projects_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy project */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the milestone was completed */,
  "milestone_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the milestone */,
  "milestone_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome or results of the milestone */,
  "milestone_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the milestone on the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES energy_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy usage record */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household or unit */,
  "consumption_qty" REAL /* Quantity of energy consumed */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., kWh, liters) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of consumption */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day for the consumption data */,
  "peak_flag" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the consumption is during peak hours */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the energy consumption */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., Residential, Commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_id") REFERENCES energy_usage ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household or unit */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality or village */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the household or unit */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the household */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the household (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "household_type" TEXT /* Type of household (e.g., Single, Family, Commercial) */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., Apartment, House) */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the household */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Primary source of income for the household */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level of the household members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources_details" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of energy source (e.g., Renewable, Non-Renewable) */,
  "generation_capacity" REAL /* Generation capacity of the energy source */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of energy (e.g., per kWh, per liter) */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the energy source (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "renewable_capacity" REAL /* Renewable generation capacity */,
  "non_renewable_capacity" REAL /* Non-renewable generation capacity */,
  "renewable_cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of renewable energy */,
  "non_renewable_cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of non-renewable energy */,
  "renewable_emission_factor" REAL /* Emission factor for renewable energy */,
  "non_renewable_emission_factor" REAL /* Emission factor for non-renewable energy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_source_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the provider */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of provider (e.g., Government, Private) */,
  "provider_status" TEXT /* Status of the provider (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "provider_capacity" REAL /* Total generation capacity of the provider */,
  "provider_renewable_capacity" REAL /* Renewable generation capacity of the provider */,
  "provider_non_renewable_capacity" REAL /* Non-renewable generation capacity of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_municipalities" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider-municipality relationship */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source provider */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality or village */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the relationship */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., Active, Inactive, Terminated) */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., Long-term, Short-term) */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the contract */,
  "contract_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_municipalities_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES energy_source_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_municipalities_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Analyst, Local Official) */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, Logout, View, Edit) */,
  "module_accessed" TEXT /* Module or feature of the system accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
